svg.text: Asana Card — Structure, Flow & Seed Skills
Flat-task model: every card is top-level — epic grouping by the Feature field, never by nesting
workspace fields, attached once · required from BACKLOG onward
a card carries a Theme + a Feature — it does not nest under them
Asana can't move a subtask between board sections — it is frozen under its parent and
can never flow INBOX → DONE. So every workflow task is a direct member of a section.
order is load-bearing · then copy parent's Feature/Theme · tool: asana_ops.py --elevate-subtasks
— 8 sections · every card top-level & freely movable
full fields required — 8 incl. Theme + Feature · owner + sprint from TODO on
creates the structure — required admins · 8 custom fields · 8 sections · initial Release option
maintains it — elevate-subtasks · missing-Feature · dedup · field backfill · stale-INBOX · source attribution
